name: Jutal Offshore Oil Services Limited
summary: Jutal Offshore Oil Services Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the fabrication of facilities, and provision of integrated services for oil and gas industries, new energy, and refining and chemical industries. The company offers offshore engineering and modular construction services, including construction of large-scale modules, such as onshore LNG modules, modular plants, upper modules of offshore platforms, and FPSO/FLNG modules; petrochemical and shipbuilding services comprising projects in oil and gas process modules, petrochemical equipment and undersea business, and EPC contracting services; and technical support services for shipbuilding industry, as well as ship repair and construction services. It also provides oil and gas treatment technical services, which include treatment technology and solutions in natural gas purification and treatment, oil production water treatment, and sludge purification; and new energy equipment construction services, such as services for the development and utilization of new energy, as well as undertakes construction of crane products. It operates in the People's Republic of China, the United States, Switzerland, Norway, Singapore, Japan, France, the United Kingdom, the Netherlands, and internationally. Jutal Offshore Oil Services Limited was founded in 1995 and is headquartered in Shenzhen, the People's Republic of China.
